category_sources: source_facts.description says libvisio interprets and imports Visio diagrams.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives libvisio; source_facts.homepage is the official Document Foundation wiki page for libvisio.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Document Foundation wiki page dedicated to libvisio.
repo_sources: Official freedesktop cgit repository browser lists libreoffice/libvisio as the repository for parsing the Visio file format structure and provides clone URLs.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Visio diagram import; source_facts.executables lists vsd/vss conversion utilities such as vsd2text and vsd2xhtml.
